name: My insurer wants more info on my delayed work sickness, how long do they have in Utah?

mainEntity.name: My insurer wants more info on my delayed work sickness, how long do they have in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.description: 21 days to accept/deny or investigate further, plus 24 days extension.[2] Don't delay responses.[3] Key factors: Provide records promptly. Attorney communicates to avoid denial.
